This class is responsible for adding entries to a specified table in the database.

cashier - package cashier
 
cashier - Class in cashier
Cashier point-of-sale window for Team 14.

Constructs the cashier window for the given employee.
cashier.CartLine - Class in cashier
Model class representing a single line in the cart.
cashier.Topping - Class in cashier
Model class representing a topping or ingredient.
cashier.ToppingLine - Class in cashier
Model class representing a selected topping in a cart line.

Provides the classes used to launch the application and handle user login.

getAllInventoryItems() - Method in class database.InventoryItemData
Retrieves all inventory items from the database and returns them as a list of InventoryItem objects.

Retrieves all inventory-menu relationships from the database and returns them as a list of InventoryMenu objects.

Retrieves all menu items from the database and returns them as a list of MenuItem objects.

Retrieves all order items from the database and returns them as a list of OrderItem objects.
